name: Dayaat Mahrous
overview: Dayaat Mahrous is a gripping drama series that explores the intricate dynamics of family, loyalty, and ambition in a small village setting. Mahrous, a complex and charismatic protagonist, finds himself caught between tradition and modernity, as his decisions ripple through the lives of those around him. The show delves into themes of power, betrayal, and redemption, with richly developed characters and stunning visuals bringing the story to life.

trailers.title: أغنية ضيعة محروس / أغنية البداية ضيعة محروس / أغنية للاطفال من الزمن الجميل / Anis Haddad
